[[BLOCK:slide10_shape1]]
The R Square is 0.199, which indicates that this model explains approximately 20% of the variance in weight. However, when multiple predictors are included, the program applies the adjusted R Square to account for the inflation of the R Square value. Interestingly, the adjusted R Square is negative. Since R Square is calculated as r * r, it is not expected to be negative. What could be causing this?
